ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement frequency */,
  "flow" REAL /* Flow rate of the measurement */,
  "fco2" REAL /* CO2 flux of the measurement */,
  "fo2" REAL /* O2 flux of the measurement */,
  "time_min_rel" REAL /* Relative time of the measurement */,
  "time_min_abs" REAL /* Absolute time of the measurement */,
  "raw_time" REAL /* Raw time of the measurement */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the measurement was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES measurement_frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement frequency */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement frequency */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval between measurements */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments_researchers" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement version */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_file_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
